channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin price gains nearly 10% in July, but traders still see BTC copying 2022 bear market
item.description: Bitcoin price gains approached 10% for the first two weeks of the month, but analysis warned of the bear market returning from August onward.

item.title: Dollar stablecoins could improve FX access but amplify currency runs: IMF paper
item.description: An IMF working paper says dollar stablecoins can improve access to foreign currency but may also help coordinate exits from local currencies during periods of severe exchange-rate stress.

item.title: we really CTO'd all of crypto from the stone bottom - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9IaWtjQ2R0bVVoR3VyWFU4aElYNzR6XzFiZ1lEeHI1V1d4N2lYR0JFX1hBQ29SOUs1OWdENG9LTlJ3blV2aTNOaFNqUU8zaFp3S0I0eXkxbFRPeHJRZWln?oc=5" target="_blank">we really CTO'd all of crypto from the…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Robinhood says its AI agent feature will ‘soon’ be assisting crypto traders
item.description: More than 70,000 agentic accounts have already been created by Robinhood equities and options traders since late May, when Robinhood launched a beta version of the product.

item.title: ⚡ INSIGHT: Ethereum's energy use has fallen more than 99.9% since the Merge, according to a new Cambridge study. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1XU251SS1rWjR4MDdKQ3kwTnNTRHdRTHYybVQteUFuVFVhMXVBdVlseWpmN3VENzFtSC1QOTU4ay1lNnpVN1FNbk90S3ZQdHJLLUlWWVNIOU9MWWdMbkZEYVc4TTE?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡ INSIGHT: Ethereum's energy us…

item.title: Bitcoin analysts predict $300,000–$500,000 price in 2029. The math says no
item.description: Analysts predict a rally to $300,000 or more by 2029. But key data suggests the era of moonshots may be over.

item.title: DOJ moves to dismiss charges against alleged $722M BitClub fraudster: Report
item.description: Matthew Goettsche was set to face trial in October for conspiracy to commit wire fraud and selling unregistered securities.

item.title: Apple Sues OpenAI, Claims Former Employees Stole Trade Secrets
item.description: Apple alleges former employees took confidential designs, supplier information, and engineering files before joining OpenAI.

item.title: Meta's Chief Data Officer Says Agentic Commerce is the "Next Tier of Business"
item.description: Alex Schultz says stablecoins are assumed inside Meta. The harder problem is getting the rest of the world there.

item.title: Kraken to overhaul app with AI investing assistant
item.description: The redesigned app will use AI to recommend trades and tailor investing tools around users' financial goals as Kraken expands into broader financial services.

item.title: Senate Democrats call for hearings into Trump’s ties to crypto amid CLARITY Act discussions
item.description: Five senators called for committee hearings to investigate US President Donald Trump’s policies potentially being influenced by crypto funding from United Arab Emirates-linked and other entities.

item.title: Democrats Call for Senate Hearings on Trump's Massive Crypto Profits
item.description: Top Democrats on key Senate committees demanded inquiries into the more than $1.2 billion that President Trump made on crypto last year.

item.title: 🇯🇵 JUST IN: JAPAN IS PLANNING TO LEGALIZE CRYPTO ETFS Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama confirmed the government "would like to proceed with considerations toward legalizing cryptocurrency ETFs in Japan as well," per Nikkei. The move follows - x.com

item.title: Crypto is coming to agentic trading. Eligible US customers will soon be able to connect their AI agent to a dedicated Robinhood account to trade crypto on their behalf, with the same real-time P&L tracking and push notifications they already know from agentic t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBNSXFsSU5RNV8yd3dNaFlXaDZMeHdjZkVmTTB6SUVaUUpuelBCd1FTelV1emQ5V1NlZmZHa3c0M2JUV3lMMEZ2el84MDJZR0EtYjlZdzdodUhlSDhZTzNPRFpZaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto is coming to agentic trad…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Metaplanet will offer Bitcoin-backed digital credit products 👀 BULLISH 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1HYl9GUXVSZ09hVWtmc0pWLUt3VEp4cjBhNmZZM3Z2czJITG41TS1iU1Q2MFVjelJKclBEQ2hKM0szaFJIYjhoeVR0aWNrQ2dfZEV4YlRyWXFFYXZ2SmhxbGhjZUxYSTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Metap…

item.title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
item.description: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.

item.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
item.description: Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital said it sold 1,400 Bitcoin since May to help fuel an AI data center deal, legal bills, and other expenses.

item.title: 🚨NEWS: Wyoming crypto bank @custodiabank has officially filed a certiorari petition with the Supreme Court, asking it to review whether regional Federal Reserve Banks have the discretion to deny eligible state-chartered banks access to master accounts. Cu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE4xSklHZ2Y0b2RXaW4wZURBajNpR3lQZlV4QlhDbDllM2gxUUFFSGxJREVCeFFoaDJHcl9DSDhQaEpwVnZ3dXl4WVFMR05fWVdZYzUwR1B3cnZiSm1qM0xYNllwTkdQUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEWS: Wyoming crypto bank …

item.title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
item.description: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.

item.title: South Korea's largest automaker completes pilot USDT stablecoin transfer on Avalanche Hyundai Motor, South Korea's largest automaker, became the country’s first major company to use blockchain for real-time internal cross-border treasury transfers. The co - x.com

item.title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
item.description: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

item.title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
item.description: The launch comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.

item.title: U.S. government digital dollar set to be banned tonight under housing law's CBDC limit
item.description: Despite President Donald Trump's refusal to sign Congress' bipartisan housing bill, it's set to go into effect at midnight, and its temporary CBDC ban along with it.

item.title: Crypto Biz: How stablecoins found their niche
item.description: Stablecoins are carving out specialized roles as regulation reshapes the market, while Strategy’s Bitcoin sale and Vanguard’s tokenization push highlight crypto’s evolving financial landscape.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama on Bitcoin and crypto ETFs, "we would like to proceed with considerations toward legalizing cryptocurrency ETFs in Japan as well." 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5iTW52bFRPZ1Y1dE5hVUdHZ25ZelktSGoycG5UcEp6VmZTbG5JOFhMSW56OGV0SkRDZGoxdlc4azl3eW5GWFlQR0xZMVY0bmNsaENFbzVUaXljUWpGb3lsN0FQN1BxOUk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Finan…

item.title: Hyundai becomes first major South Korean company to introduce internal stablecoin transfers
item.description: The initiative builds on a broader shift by companies exploring stablecoins to move money between international operations more efficiently.

item.title: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
item.description: Unless President Trump vetoes the bill, it will become law at midnight, banning the Federal Reserve from developing a CBDC until 2031.

item.title: Bitcoin whales sent BTC price to $64K as Coinbase Premium broke key level: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin price gains came thanks to US whales propeling the Coinbase Premium above a key trend line, new analysis from CryptoQuant reported.

item.title: Circle Stock Jumps as Stablecoin Issuer Wins Final Federal Banking Charter Approval
item.description: Circle secured final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, shifting its $73.2 billion stablecoin to a unified federal framework.

item.title: A16z’s Andreessen lands Federal Reserve role as AI reshapes policy debate
item.description: The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead an AI productivity and jobs task force under Chair Kevin Warsh’s policy review.

item.title: Standard Chartered Says Bitcoin at $64K Is a “Screaming Buy,” Maintains $100K Target According to The Block, Standard Chartered’s Head of Digital Assets Research Geoffrey Kendrick said recent concerns surrounding Strategy reflect a communication issu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9nRXlldnpFeXdqYlF2NDc2TlA1NXFHWlg1Vk0yOGNOTWRxQ2pWeng3eWN2YVdpUzdZNVN2ZVhEZTVQVWlEME9ZWktDR1pmeTFSajJOTWttWmNsUy1VSVJ4eUtXWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Standard Chartered Says Bitcoin …

item.title: MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny
item.description: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.

item.title: Strategy Bitcoin Sales 'Mostly Noise,' Standard Chartered Says, Holding $100K BTC Call
item.description: The bank argues that the treasury giant's Bitcoin sales are a short-term distraction, reiterating its $100,000 year-end price target.

item.title: Will the crypto lobby's $189M campaign get CLARITY over the line?
item.description: As the CLARITY Act advances, crypto's growing political influence in Washington is under scrutiny. But the crypto lobby's massive campaign spend is only part of the story.

item.title: JUST IN: Standard Chartered Bank says it still predicts Bitcoin to hit $100,000 this year, calling BTC "a screaming buy." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5ERlN0QnFXWjNKNi1jOGRHMmVxRko0REUwemJOQUZCMnpTcTU2Xy1RYi1yV3VzN0RGMFV6ejZTaHdmeWJrMl8yZ0NvdnlvdU1HWDNzNGV0d1BveE5Kd1BqTGxXSi1vak0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Standard Chartered…

item.title: OKX, MetaMask, Matter Labs back dispute resolution court for AI agents
item.description: The Genlayer Foundation is leading the 27-firm consortium that makes AI-based payments, escrow and dispute resolution interoperable.

item.title: US charges prisoner over alleged laundering of seized Kraken crypto
item.description: US prosecutors charged Rossen Iossifov over the alleged laundering of $290,000 in forfeited crypto from a Kraken account.

item.title: Morning Minute: Robinhood Chain Explodes Onto the Crypto Scene
item.description: Plus, Circle wins a national bank charter and pops 10%. And the Clarity Act gets a new draft while the clock is ticking…

item.title: The Sun Rises in Seoul and Trades on Solana: $SKHY is Now Live
item.description: SK Hynix ($SKHY), South Korea’s dominant memory-chip maker, is now live on Solana.

item.title: Wall Street banks tighten prediction market rules for staff as insider fears spread
item.description: Wall Street banks, including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, are restricting employee prediction market trades as insider trading fears spread across Polymarket and Kalshi.

item.title: Circle soars after securing U.S. trust bank approval in crypto expansion
item.description: The approval adds to a growing list of crypto firms seeking federal banking licenses as the industry moves into the regulated financial system.

item.title: Japan's 'invest locally' plan likely to spur demand for assets like bitcoin, gold
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 10, 2026

item.title: USDC issuer Circle wins final approval for US national trust bank charter
item.description: Circle announces it received final OCC approval for a national trust bank that will initially serve the company and affiliates, with possible future custody services for institutional clients.

item.title: Jailed Fraudster Charged With Moving $290K in Forfeited Crypto From Prison
item.description: A convicted launderer serving time for a $5 million scheme allegedly moved crypto that a court had ordered him to forfeit.

item.title: Japanese lender launches Bitcoin-backed loans of up to $6.2M
item.description: CRYL is offering Bitcoin-backed loans to individuals and businesses as Japanese firms explore broader uses for BTC in lending and credit markets.

item.title: 🚨BREAKING: CIRCLE RECEIVES FINAL US APPROVAL TO ESTABLISH A CRYPTO-FOCUSED TRUST BANK After previously receiving conditional approval, Circle has now secured final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank. As a federally regulat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFByWHhGMlE0V0R2ajNsSXNSOEVVZEJ5dDVFMVBqajhnNjJXa2V0ZFhEejBoYklZZXhVZk9Hdlp2dFYtckU2bW01U2ZEZDRPZG5PbHhVcjhrOTVTUUlsMG53dA?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨BREAKING: CIRCLE RECEIVES FINAL US…

item.title: Crypto defies equity weakness as altcoin optimism builds into the weekend
item.description: The price of bitcoin hit $64,400, retesting a level it failed to penetrate on Monday, with a break higher opening the path toward the June 15 peak of $67,250.

item.title: TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report
item.description: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf is reportedly seeking $3.5 billion in debt financing led by Morgan Stanley for its Kentucky data center campus leased by AI company Anthropic.

item.title: North Carolina Bill Recognizes CFTC's ‘Federal Regulatory Authority’ Over Prediction Markets
item.description: The state's budget law leaves oversight of Kalshi and Polymarket to the CFTC and taxes them at 6%, far below what other states are pursuing.

item.title: Polymarket seeks approval to bring margin trading to U.S. customers
item.description: Polymarket's application to allow users to take positions that are not fully collateralized follows authorization granted to rival Kalshi in March.

item.title: Bitcoin's $60,000-$70,000 range becomes third most traded range in history
item.description: Bitcoin has spent 307 days in the $60,000-$70,000 range, the third longest consolidation in any $10,000 price band.

item.title: Metaplanet explores bringing bitcoin-backed digital credit to Japan
item.description: The bitcoin treasury company is working with JPYC and Progmat to explore tokenized credit products backed by bitcoin, aiming to create efficient, 24/7 credit markets in Japan.

item.title: Bitcoin gets a green light from a reliable momentum gauge. Here are key levels to watch
item.description: A smoother long-term MACD just flipped bullish, pointing to more upside. Here are key levels that will decide if the ongoing bounce turns into a full blown uptrend.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises to $64,000 as SK Hynix opens for trade after $26.5 billion IPO
item.description: Spot bitcoin funds lost about $95 million on Thursday and ether funds roughly $52 million, ending the one bright spot in crypto's institutional flows even as prices rallied.

item.title: very rare circumstance where both retail and HNW crypto native capital is mostly sidelined retail sidelined bc of outperformance of ai stocks HNW crypto natives sidelined bc of 4 year cycle timing waiting for Q4 a *lot* of capital will chase quickly if coins rip here - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE11QjJqOWtac0Roa194THdKMy03ZWJfLWVGZnF0aXJ1V19hamRhMVA1MV9POTZqckNNbHNUU3g4ODR2MlZDaUstZzlUTkhCNTZobE00SldCZzNwS1ltUkYw?oc=5" target="_blank">very rare circumstance where both reta…

item.title: XRP up 2% as buyers push through $1.10 resistance
item.description: A late-session volume surge carried XRP above its recent range, with traders now watching whether $1.10 can hold as support.

item.title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
item.description: A sharp rise in the yen has left bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies underperforming in yen terms compared with their dollar-based trading pairs.

item.title: Bitcoin zips higher to nearly $64,000 as chip rally and yen strength drive gains
item.description: Bitcoin is up 4.2% over seven days that contained an oil shock, a bond selloff and two rounds of U.S. strikes on Iran.

item.title: Bitcoin fell to its 2nd most oversold level in history on the monthly chart 🚨 The only time it was lower was December 2022, when $BTC went on to soar 660% over the next 3 years 📈 🥳 🤑 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5FN0YyYzA1djlZdExoOEtYaXlUS3k0NE1mSzJpdzdmQnBJLXVzV25nQkhFdm9FdU0ycGJDaDZmWGRxZGxoc0pxVDl3Vl9SNW1BOW1CRHRRVTRzLVdwRkE?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin fell to its 2nd most oversold l…
